meaning: adj.许多的,大量的,丰富的,丰饶的
examples: Rainfall is plentiful in the area.
Our food, such as it is, is plentiful.
She survived because of a plentiful supply of fresh water.
Most restaurants -- where the options for fresh seafood dishes are plentiful -- double as nightlife destinations.
Reasonable prices for oil and gas can only be maintained if there is a plentiful supply.
